previousDayImpact: France's dominant win over Sweden propelled Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard up the leaderboard, securing critical points for their respective campaigns.
Norway's victory over Ivory Coast provided a significant boost to Team Megatronless and Team Jordan, helping them maintain their positions in the top five.
Mexico's win over Ecuador offered minimal separation for Team Choo Choo and Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, as both entries only gained two points from the result.
leaderboardSummary: Team Godfather has taken over the lead, climbing to 1st place after a successful day of scoring.
Bijan Mustard saw the largest jump, surging six spots to reach 3rd place following a 19-point gain.
Team Megatronless also made a strong move, climbing four spots to 4th place after securing 18 points.
leverageWatch: The upcoming match between Bosnia & Herzegovina and USA is a massive point of consensus, with eight of the top ten entries relying on a USA victory to bolster their scores.
Team Choo Choo has a unique opportunity to gain ground in the England vs. DR Congo match, as they are the only entry among the leaders with England on their roster.
Team koyn is the sole entry looking for a boost from Belgium in their matchup against Senegal, providing a chance to climb from the bottom of the top ten.
